title: Context and Providers
description: Contexts share data across the component tree without passing props through every level.
creating_context_intro: <0>createContext</0> declares a typed channel with a default value. The site publisher creates an <1>AwsContext</1> that carries a live S3 client and its region down the tree.
providing_values_intro: A component wraps its children in the context's <0>Provider</0>. <1>AwsProvider</1> builds the S3 client once, registers cleanup, and publishes the connection to everything nested inside it.
consuming_intro: <0>useContext</0> reads the nearest provider's value. The <1>useAws</1> hook wraps that read and throws a clear error when it runs outside a provider.
tip_cross_cutting: Use contexts for cross-cutting concerns like an AWS region, a shared client, or credentials that many components need.
